name: Maple Walnut Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Nestle Toll House Premier White Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, evaporated milk, sugar, and salt in a medium, heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 4 1/2 to 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in marshmallows, morsels, nuts, and maple flavoring.
6. Stir vigorously for 1 minute or until marshmallows are melted.
7. Pour into foil-lined 13x9-inch baking pan.
8. Place walnut halves in rows, spacing about 1/2 inch apart on top of fudge.
9. Press into fudge.
10. Chill until firm.
11. Cut into squares with one walnut half per square.
